title: binaria nigra
intro: Binaria nigra, also known as Black Purgative Root, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Binaria nigra include its ability to act as a purgative, laxative, and anthelmintic, due to the presence of alkaloids such as vobasine and vobasinine. The health benefits of Binaria nigra include its use in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to help reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Binaria nigra is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be found in some traditional medicine systems, particularly in Latin American folk medicine.
